column2: My lady!
column5: Colored some cells so if I'm going to have time to give characters expressions, I know retroactively where to change sprites

column2: Her grace...!
Magda, something's wrong, right? The air feels heavy.
It's probably the mold...
(You look down at the dust that made up your liege lady. She's...)
(Bile rises to your throat, but before you can vomit, you notice a marble glimmering in the dirt.)
(She's left no other remains. Best to take the glass bauble and continue.)
(But if Duchess Josephine is dead...what next?)
That armor...are you from House Ronan?
Um...
(His eyes glance toward you.)
Yes.
So do you know what's going on? And that lady, who was--
That lady was Duchess Josephine? Like Duchess Dowager Josephine of House Ronan?
...yes.
Why the hell would Lady Josephine's entourage follow us down a WELL?
Probably for the same reason you were going down a well in the first place.
You don't know what happened?
Well, does the Sisterhood know what happened?
Why the hell do you think WE jumped down a well? You think that was planned?
She's gone. It matters not.
I'm sorry for my subordinate. I'm Rachelle, knight captain of House Ronan and personal guard to...
Well, former personal guard to Duchess Josephine.
(You look towards Einar.)
...I'm Einar, also a knight of House Ronan.
Lachlan.
I'm Magda.
Are you a sister of the cloth?
Well, I don't wear all these bangles for fun, alright?
Right. But you can heal?
Sorry, I don't know a prayer to turn someone back from dust.
I couldn't ask that of you. I was more worried in case we found trouble down here.
I'm concerned because there's no records of a cave out this far in the territory.
Your companion is a mage of the Academy?
(She looks startled. Her eyes dart back to Lachlan.)
Yes. He's adept at different fire spells. If we're going deeper, we'll be of great help.
I'll take the vanguard. Einar is an excellent sniper.
With all of us, we should be able to figure out what's down here. And get back to the surface.
You think there's a surface still up there? That explosion--
Cut it out. Yes, Dame Rachelle, we'll be happy to accompany you.
